description: Multi-step polars LazyFrame pipeline in a single Dagster asset (query-plan fusion across all steps).

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame(s) — one or more, depending on shape

outputs.description: Polars or pandas DataFrame after the chain (last step / primary_step)

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Flat shape (one source, one ops chain, one sink)

operations.label: Operations
operations.description: Flat shape: ordered list of polars ops applied to upstream_asset_key. Supported: filter, with_columns, select, drop, group_by, sort, head/limit, tail, head_per_group, unique, drop_nulls, fill_null, cast, join, sql.

steps.description: Multi-step form. Each step: {id, source: {kind: upstream|ref, upstream_asset_key|ref}, operations: [...]}. Use 'op: sql' to drop into polars SQLContext (current chain = 'self'; prior steps usable by id).

sinks.description: Optional side-output writes. Each: {from: <step_id>, kind: parquet|csv, path: '...'}. Asset's return value still comes from primary_step.

primary_step.description: Step id whose frame is the asset's return value (default: last step)
